name: MUELLER INDUSTRIES INC
summary: PART I Introduction Mueller Industries, Inc. (the Company) is a leading manufacturer of copper, brass, and aluminum products.The range of products we manufacture is broad:copper tube and fittings; line sets; steel nipples; brass rod, bar, and shapes; aluminum and brass forgings; aluminum impact extrusions; refrigeration valves and fittings; compressed gas valves; pressure vessels; insulated flexible duct systems; and high-quality wire and cable solutions.We also resell brass and plastic plumbing...
